channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Video: F-16 And Sukhoi-30 Welcome PM Modi's Aircraft In Indonesian Airspace

media:content.media:description: An F-16 and a Sukhoi-30 fighter jet flies alongside PM Modi's aircraft in Indonesia

item.description: PM Narendra Modi in a post on X said he was "touched by President Prabowo Subianto's gesture of welcoming me at the airport."
item.content:encoded: PM Narendra Modi in a post on X said he was "touched by President Prabowo Subianto's gesture of welcoming me at the airport."

item.title: Viral Again: Flying Umbrella That Follows Its User Turns Heads Online

media:content.media:description: He first built a smaller test drone to experiment safely before moving to the larger umbrella.

item.description: The most significant feature of the project is its ability to hover and automatically follow a person.
item.content:encoded: The most significant feature of the project is its ability to hover and automatically follow a person.

item.title: "Like Freedom": How Armenia Became Safe Haven For Russians Fleeing Putin

media:content.media:description: Yerevan has become a safe place for tens of thousands of Russians.

item.description: Since 2022, Armenia's capital, Yerevan, has become a safe place for tens of thousands of Russians who left their country to avoid the war in Ukraine.
item.content:encoded: Since 2022, Armenia's capital, Yerevan, has become a safe place for tens of thousands of Russians who left their country to avoid the war in Ukraine.

item.title: India Helps Unlock Universe's Secrets, From God Particle To Dark Matter

media:content.media:description: India's association with CERN stretches back more than six decades

item.description: Buried deep underground, this extraordinary machine has already transformed humanity's understanding of the universe.
item.content:encoded: Buried deep underground, this extraordinary machine has already transformed humanity's understanding of the universe.

item.title: Trade, Defence And Critical Minerals: What Is On PM Modi's Australia Agenda

media:content.media:description: As both countries seek to diversify supply chains

item.description: The visit comes as India and Australia have elevated their relationship into a comprehensive strategic partnership, with both nations emerging as key players in maintaining a free, open, and inclusive Indo-Pacific amid growing geopolitical uncertainties.
item.content:encoded: The visit comes as India and Australia have elevated their relationship into a comprehensive strategic partnership, with both nations emerging as key players in maintaining a free, open, and inclusive Indo-Pacific amid growing geopolitical uncertainties.

item.title: 25 Dead, 100 Injured In Clashes At Sri Lanka Prison

media:content.media:description: Fighting began on Sunday evening at Negombo prison.

item.description: The wounded were rushed to the Negombo hospital, north of the capital Colombo, following overnight clashes between inmates from two drug gangs at the area's main prison, police said.
item.content:encoded: The wounded were rushed to the Negombo hospital, north of the capital Colombo, following overnight clashes between inmates from two drug gangs at the area's main prison, police said.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | America's Battlefield Dominance Is Under Serious Threat
item.description: Warfare, strategy and weapons systems are morphing at extraordinary speed. The US still possesses by far the most capable military.
item.content:encoded: Warfare, strategy and weapons systems are morphing at extraordinary speed. The US still possesses by far the most capable military.

item.title: Turkey Blocks American All-Gay Cruise Ship From Docking, Cites "Moral Values"

media:content.media:description: The ship will now stop in Cairo and Crete instead of Turkey.

item.description: The trip was billed as an "all-gay voyage" and included scheduled stops in Turkey's port city of Kuadas on July 7 and later Istanbul.
item.content:encoded: The trip was billed as an "all-gay voyage" and included scheduled stops in Turkey's port city of Kuadas on July 7 and later Istanbul.

item.title: 'Gratitude To Friendly India': Iran's Thank You Note Amid Khamenei's Funeral

media:content.media:description: In a long post on X, the Iranian Embassy thanked the Indian community for participation

item.description: In a long post on X, the Iranian Embassy thanked the Indian community for participation and said that the Islamic republic will never forget this "gesture of friendship, compassion, and heartfelt respect."
item.content:encoded: In a long post on X, the Iranian Embassy thanked the Indian community for participation and said that the Islamic republic will never forget this "gesture of friendship, compassion, and heartfelt respect."

item.title: 'Restraining Order Needed': Trump Reignites Feud With Italian PM Meloni Ahead Of NATO Summit

media:content.media:description: In the photo, Meloni, 49, appeared to look upward at Trump with a smile.

item.description: The feud between the two world leaders began when Trump claimed last week that Meloni asked "over and over" for a photo with him during the recent Group of Seven summit -- and suggested she begged for such a picture.
item.content:encoded: The feud between the two world leaders began when Trump claimed last week that Meloni asked "over and over" for a photo with him during the recent Group of Seven summit -- and suggested she begged for such a picture.

item.title: More Than 3,000 Dead, 50,000 Missing After Venezuela Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: Venezuela earthquakes death count hits 3,342 as thousands remain missing

item.description: At least 3,342 dead and 16,700 injured as Venezuela buries unidentified quake victims; UN estimates 50,000 people still missing nationwide
item.content:encoded: At least 3,342 dead and 16,700 injured as Venezuela buries unidentified quake victims; UN estimates 50,000 people still missing nationwide

item.title: 8 Killed In Ukraine As Russia Strikes Kyiv Ahead Of NATO Summit

media:content.media:description: Rescuers carry a wounded resident from a building damaged following a Russian missile strike on Kyiv

item.description: The strike, Kyiv's second in a week, comes as Trump prepares to meet Zelensky and later speak with Putin in Ankara.
item.content:encoded: The strike, Kyiv's second in a week, comes as Trump prepares to meet Zelensky and later speak with Putin in Ankara.

item.title: Trump Shares Fake Obama Image With Arabic, 'Black Lives Matter' Graffiti

media:content.media:description: The post also shows graffiti in Arabic on the plane that says the phrase "alhamdulillah"

item.description: President Donald Trump has a yearslong record of intensely personal criticism of the Obamas, and of using incendiary, sometimes racist, rhetoric.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump has a yearslong record of intensely personal criticism of the Obamas, and of using incendiary, sometimes racist, rhetoric.

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi Makes Landfall In US Pacific Island, Residents Warned To Stay Indoors

media:content.media:description: The storm comes months after Super Typhoon Sinlaku battered islands in the region in April

item.description: Super Typhoon Bavi hit the Northern Mariana Islands with 100+ mph winds, forcing residents indoors as officials warn of life-threatening danger
item.content:encoded: Super Typhoon Bavi hit the Northern Mariana Islands with 100+ mph winds, forcing residents indoors as officials warn of life-threatening danger

item.title: Ballroom, Kennedy Center, Oval Office: Inside Trump's White House Makeover

media:content.media:description: Trump embarked on his first redecoration project at White House when he moved into Oval Office in 2025

item.description: Trump is reshaping Washington with a new ballroom, a 250-foot arch, and Kennedy Center renovations sparking lawsuits, backlash, and controversy
item.content:encoded: Trump is reshaping Washington with a new ballroom, a 250-foot arch, and Kennedy Center renovations sparking lawsuits, backlash, and controversy

item.title: Ali Khamenei's Funeral Has Summer Festival Feel: Free Food, Music, Crowds

media:content.media:description: Volunteers provided fruit juice and water under a scorching sun in the capital's city centre

item.description: Free eggs, watermelon and electronic music mix with chants of "death to America" as Iran mourns Khamenei over six days.
item.content:encoded: Free eggs, watermelon and electronic music mix with chants of "death to America" as Iran mourns Khamenei over six days.

item.title: UK Tightens Rules On Overseas Donations Amid Farage Funding Probe
item.description: UK tightens overseas political donation rules to curb foreign interference, as Farage faces a watchdog probe over an undeclared crypto donation.
item.content:encoded: UK tightens overseas political donation rules to curb foreign interference, as Farage faces a watchdog probe over an undeclared crypto donation.

item.title: Israeli Votes To Defy Supreme Court Ruling On Broadcast Regulator

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu has not commented on the cabinet's decision, but his rivals did

item.description: This is the first time Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's government has flouted a Supreme Court ruling, although it has clashed with the judiciary in the past.
item.content:encoded: This is the first time Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's government has flouted a Supreme Court ruling, although it has clashed with the judiciary in the past.

item.title: 'Need India's Help': PoK Leader's Cry For Aid Amid Pakistan's Brutalities

media:content.media:description: Khan asked the crowd whether they should move towards LoC (File Photo)

item.description: The appeal comes as PoK witnesses large-scale protests against the Pakistani administration since last month. Last week, during a massive protest rally held at the Eidgah Ground, people chanted slogans like "PoK is not part of Pakistan".
item.content:encoded: The appeal comes as PoK witnesses large-scale protests against the Pakistani administration since last month. Last week, during a massive protest rally held at the Eidgah Ground, people chanted slogans like "PoK is not part of Pakistan".

item.title: Mysterious Spheres Wash Up On Australian Beach, Could Be Rocket 'Space Balls'

media:content.media:description: The agency is continuing its investigation in coordination with emergency management authorities.

item.description: Reports showed the objects, washed up on beaches in the Forrest Beach area of Townsville, appeared to be large spheres.
item.content:encoded: Reports showed the objects, washed up on beaches in the Forrest Beach area of Townsville, appeared to be large spheres.
